evals.prompt: Write a PRD for adding CSV export to the reporting dashboard
evals.expected_output: PRD written as a business document. Problem and Objective in user/outcome language. No technical implementation details. Success criteria observable by a non-technical stakeholder.
assertions: prd.md contains a ## Success Criteria section with at least 2 checkboxes
prd.md ## Objective is written from user/business perspective, not implementation perspective
prd.md ## Success Criteria are observable by a non-technical stakeholder
prd.md contains no framework or library names
prd.md contains no file paths in the narrative body
prd.md contains no HTTP method names or endpoint paths
Skill presents PRD for review and asks approval questions before writing

evals.prompt: Write a PRD for the core-logic milestone
evals.expected_output: PRD reads roadmap and active milestone context before generating. References the parent milestone.
assertions: Skill reads the active milestone PRD for context
prd.md ## References includes the parent milestone PRD path
prd.md ## Context traces back to a milestone in the roadmap
Milestone PRD materials table is updated to include this work item row
